ResearchProjectDef.label: Imperium work gear
ResearchProjectDef.description: Prepare to manufacture profession-appropriate gear and clothing for Imperial personnel, from bureaucrats to voidship crew.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Retinue garb
ResearchProjectDef.description: Prepare to manufacture profession-appropriate gear and clothing for high-ranking Imperial personnel such as are found in the retinues of the illustrious Rogue Trader dynasties.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Imperial noble accoutrements
ResearchProjectDef.description: Prepare to craft gear and clothing for the highest-ranking Imperial nobility, including the illustrious and daring Rogue Traders.

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced Munitorum equipment
ResearchProjectDef.description: Negotiate the Munitorum permissions necessary for local production of more esoteric weaponry and equipment, of the type often used by armsmen of Rogue Trader dynasties.
